titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Department of Athletics, Yale University, Records Documenting Track and Cross Country
Department of Athletics, Yale University, Records Documenting Track and Cross Country
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday November 14, 2020 at 08:14

did.unittitle: Department of Athletics, Yale University, records documenting track and cross country
did.abstract: The records consist of scrapbooks, correspondence, score cards, and publications documenting track and cross country at Yale University.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 38-B (YRG 38-B), Records documenting specific sports at Yale.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the Department of Athletics, 2005.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is partially restricted. See inventory for details. Scrapbooks are available on microfilm. Patrons must use HM 191 instead of the originals.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Department of Athletics, Yale University, Records Documenting Track and Cross Country (RU 943). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Yale University records are arranged and described at the accession level by the creating office. The University Archives creates collection level descriptive records, but typically does no further arrangement and description at the accession level.

altformavail.head: Existence and Location of Copies
altformavail.p: Track scrapbooks are available on microfilm from Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library, at cost. Order no. HM191. 1984. 4453 frames on 5 reels, 35mm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of scrapbooks, correspondence, score cards, and publications documenting track and cross country at Yale University.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

corpname.part: Yale University. Dept. of Athletics, Physical Education, and Recreation

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
Patrons must use FILM HM191 instead of the originals.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This material has been microfilmed. Patrons must use HM 191 instead of the originals.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted until Jan 1, 2032
